source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Log cabins or barabara, Kodiak, Alaska
description: 1899 photograph of a traditional Alutiiq (Sugpiaq) semi-subterranean dwelling — a barabara — on Kodiak Island, with log walls, sod roof, and fur-lined entrance. Barabaras were the dominant form of housing on Kodiak for centuries and were still in everyday use into the early 20th century.
alt: 1899 black-and-white photograph of a traditional Alutiiq barabara semi-subterranean log-and-sod dwelling on Kodiak Island
